seoTitle: Copy and Paste Website Funnels in GoHighLevel Fast
metaDescription: Duplicate and reuse website funnels in GoHighLevel to save time building pages for new clients or campaigns without starting over.
intro: Rebuilding a funnel from scratch for every new client or campaign wastes time when GoHighLevel lets you copy and reuse existing designs. This tutorial covers duplicating funnel pages, cloning entire funnels, and customizing copied pages for new projects.

steps.heading: Open your website or funnel
steps.body: Start by opening the existing website or funnel you want to duplicate within GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Copy and duplicate pages
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's copy tools to duplicate individual funnel pages or clone entire funnels for reuse.

steps.heading: Paste, customize, and publish
steps.body: Paste the copied pages into a new project, then customize the content and branding for the new client or campaign before publishing.

steps.heading: Transfer designs between websites
steps.body: Move page designs across different websites within your account to maintain consistent branding across projects.

steps.heading: Use snapshots and templates for reuse
steps.body: Take advantage of reusable templates and snapshots to speed up future website and funnel creation.

faq.question: Can I copy an entire funnel, not just one page?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers cloning entire funnels as well as duplicating individual funnel pages.

faq.question: Can I use a copied funnel for a different client?
faq.answer: Yes, customizing copied pages for different clients or campaigns is one of the core topics covered.

faq.question: Does this save time compared to building from scratch?
faq.answer: Yes, the whole point of this feature is to help you save time and maintain consistent branding without rebuilding everything.

faq.question: What are snapshots in GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: Snapshots are one of the reusable tools mentioned in the tutorial that help streamline funnel and website creation.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial aimed at?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, business owners, freelancers, web designers, and GoHighLevel beginners.
